posts.caption:
Pichle saal ki tarh is saal bhi FORBES me aa gaye, Yeh sab ap logo ki wajh se 🔥😍

A middle-class boy from a small town, on the @forbesindia Top 100 Digital Creators list—first in 2023, and now again in 2024. I still can’t believe it! Honestly, never thought I would come this far, but hard work, patience, and persistence made it possible. 💯

This is just the beginning. If I can make it, you can too! It’s not about where you start but about how much you’re willing to push yourself every day. 🛤️

Kasam se bas lage rahoo 💪

Grateful for every challenge and every person who supported me on this journey. Let’s keep breaking barriers together!🚀 

I Promise you i’ll work super hard and provide you tech information, all for many more years to come! ✨

#DreamBig #HardWorkPaysOff #ForbesTop100 #KeepGoing #techplusgadgets

धन्यवाद @narendramodi ji 🇮🇳
.
Is award function me sabse mil kr bhut maza aya, saare creators apne apne niche me dhoom macha rahe hai so thank you all for the pictures and I am so grateful to meet you guys 🥺😍 Hope to see you again and congratulations @ankit_baiyanpuria @maithilithakur @ranveerallahbadia @abhiandniyu @triggeredinsaan @technicalguruji @rjraunac @kabitaskitchen

Thank you all for your love and support! ❤️ 

Award ghar aa gaya hai ❤️🥺🥇 or yeh sab kuch hua ap logo ke support of pyar kr karan bigs thanks to each and everyone jinhone mujhr vote diya 🤩

I won the ‘Best Creator in Education’ award at the National Creators Award today.

Aap logo ke bina possible nhi hai yeh isliye bhut sara pyaar ❤️
.
.
.

Aajkal kuch log fake police, CBI ya Customs officer banke WhatsApp video call kar rahe hain… aur “verification” ke naam pe logon ko dara ke unse paise mang rhe hai

* Video call par kabhi bhi apni personal ya bank details share mat karo
* Kisi unknown account mein paise transfer mat karo

📞 Register a complain on Cybercrime Helpline Number – 1930

#phonepe #technoruhez #techreel #viralreels

comments.text: Got the same msg few days ago. I haven't used phonepe in over 4 years. I tried deleting the phonepe account but it told me to clear my wallet first which had ten rupees in it (i know, a lot). So i tried everything to transfer it to my or to someone else's account but it requires another kyc and wallet upgrade. So i paid my phone bill which was 9.35 rupees and tried deleting my account again and well... I was told to clear even the 0.65 rupees i had remaining. So honest and kind of them. Then i had to pay someone else's phone bil,l to get what was remaining in the wallet, out of it. After that, the app stopped responding to my account deletion request. Contacted support they raised a ticket and it's already been two days and still nothing. Super pathetic service and it took them 10 minutes to get me an executive and even after getting one i was made to wait for 2 minutes every 5 minutes of us talking. What should've taken just 5 minutes ended up taking one and a half hour and my account is still freaking there. Thanks for bringing light to this issue man.
Aj hi phonepe ka wallet account close karwa diya abhi just 5 min ke andar 🤣
Phonepe total e scam RBI guidelines nahi mana .
Chutiya company na employee ki sellry atti he

Maine phonepe par wallet activate nahi karaya tha. Phir bhi message aaya - Your Wallet has been inactive for a while. A Rs.100 inactivity fee will be levied soon. Start using your Wallet today to avoid future charges.

posts.caption:
Rating & Reviewing 8 Viral Hair Masks | Part 1

* 💧 Himalaya Protein Hair Cream — Basic botanical conditioner with no real protein repair, feels outdated.
* ✨ Wella Fusion Intense Repair — Lightweight mask with amino acids that actually penetrate and repair fine hair.
* 🧴 Nexxus Promend Repair — Mostly silicones and oils that coat hair, giving smoothness but no real repair.
* 💸 Schwarzkopf SPA Essence — Budget-friendly mask with keratin that helps strengthen damaged hair.
* 🌊 TRESemmé Hydra Matrix — Hydration-focused formula that boosts moisture without claiming repair.
* 🧪 Dove Peptide Bond Strength — Smoothening mask where silicones do the work, not true bond repair.
* 💛 L’Oréal Absolut Repair — Solid professional mask with good frizz control and protein binding.
* 🔬 Minimalist Maleic Bond Repair — Advanced formula that genuinely repairs hair bonds from within.

Rating 9 Popular DETAN & BRIGHTENING face masks.

I analyzed 9 popular masks and ranked them from worst to best based purely on ingredient science.

A real de-tan mask needs two systems working together:
• Oil control (clays like kaolin or bentonite)
• Brightening / exfoliation (AHA, BHA, niacinamide, vitamin C)

If a mask only has clay or herbal ingredients, it’s usually just a cleansing mask - not a true de-tan treatment.

Watch till the end to see which one actually performs the best. ￼

Save this before buying your next face mask.
